signals.headline: Fed Chair Powell confirms tariff-driven goods inflation peaked or peaking early 2026, expected to ease by mid-2026 assum
signals.raw:
Fed Chair Powell confirms tariff-driven goods inflation peaked or peaking early 2026, expected to ease by mid-2026 assuming no new tariffs | NO | HIGH confidence**

Powell described the economy as "very unusual" with elevated inflation mainly from tariff-affected goods, while core inflation excluding those effects runs in the low 2% range[1][3]. He stated goods inflation should peak around Q1 2026
matched_markets: Will Powell say "Tariff inflation" during April press conference?

signals.headline: Cavaliers Secure 2-0 Series Lead Over Raptors in Eastern Conference First-Round Playoffs After 115-105 Game 2 Win** | **
signals.raw:
Cavaliers Secure 2-0 Series Lead Over Raptors in Eastern Conference First-Round Playoffs After 115-105 Game 2 Win** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[1][2]

Cleveland Cavaliers defeated Toronto Raptors 115-105 in Game 2 on Monday, April 21, 2026, taking a 2-0 lead in their Eastern Conference first-round series, with Donovan Mitchell (30 points), James Harden (28 points), and Evan Mobley (25 points)
